policyname: cron_job_policy
cron_job_run_details_policy
Admins can update all applications
qual:
(auth.uid() IN ( SELECT profiles.id
   FROM profiles
  WHERE (profiles.role = 'admin'::user_role)))

policyname: Admins can view all applications
qual:
(auth.uid() IN ( SELECT profiles.id
   FROM profiles
  WHERE (profiles.role = 'admin'::user_role)))

policyname: Drivers can create their own applications
Drivers can update their own applications
Drivers can view their own applications
Clients can view driver locations for their shipments
qual:
(EXISTS ( SELECT 1
   FROM shipments s
  WHERE ((s.id = driver_locations.shipment_id) AND (s.client_id = auth.uid()))))

policyname: Drivers can insert their own location
Drivers can select their own locations
admin_full_access_locations
qual:
(EXISTS ( SELECT 1
   FROM profiles
  WHERE ((profiles.id = auth.uid()) AND (profiles.role = 'admin'::user_role))))

policyname: client_view_own_shipment_locations
qual:
(EXISTS ( SELECT 1
   FROM shipments
  WHERE ((shipments.id = driver_locations.shipment_id) AND (shipments.client_id = auth.uid()))))

policyname: driver_insert_own_location
with_check:
((driver_id = auth.uid()) AND (EXISTS ( SELECT 1
   FROM shipments
  WHERE ((shipments.id = driver_locations.shipment_id) AND (shipments.driver_id = auth.uid())))))

policyname: driver_view_own_locations
Clients can insert ratings for their shipments
Users can view ratings for their shipments

Users can view their own driver settings

qual:

policyname: Drivers can insert their own applications
Users can view applications for their shipments or their own ap
qual:
((driver_id = auth.uid()) OR (shipment_id IN ( SELECT shipments.id
   FROM shipments
  WHERE (shipments.client_id = auth.uid()))))

policyname: Users can mark their messages as read
Users can send messages through function
Users can view their messages
qual:
((auth.uid() = sender_id) OR (auth.uid() = receiver_id) OR (EXISTS ( SELECT 1
   FROM profiles
  WHERE ((profiles.id = auth.uid()) AND (profiles.role = 'admin'::user_role)))))

policyname: Users can insert their own preferences

policyname: Allow insert during signup
Allow users to insert their own profile
Enable insert for authenticated users only
Enable insert for users based on id
Enable read access for authenticated users
Enable update for users based on id

policyname: Public profiles are viewable by everyone
Service role can do anything
Users can insert own profile
Users can update own profile
Users can update their own profiles
Users can view own profile
Users can delete their own tokens
Users can insert their own tokens

Users can insert status history for their shipments

   FROM shipments
  WHERE ((shipments.client_id = auth.uid()) OR (shipments.driver_id = auth.uid())))))

qual:

policyname: Admins can update all shipments
qual:
(auth.uid() IN ( SELECT profiles.id
   FROM profiles
  WHERE (profiles.role = 'admin'::user_role)))

policyname: Admins can view all shipments
qual:
(auth.uid() IN ( SELECT profiles.id

policyname: Clients can create shipments
Clients can update their own shipments
Clients can view their own shipments
Drivers can update assigned shipments
Drivers can view assigned and available shipments
qual: ((auth.uid() = driver_id) OR ((driver_id IS NULL) AND (status = ANY (ARRAY['pending'::shipment_status, 'open'::shipment_status]))))

policyname: Users can update their shipments
Users can view their own shipments
Only drivers and admins can create tracking events
with_check:
((EXISTS ( SELECT 1
   FROM shipments
  WHERE ((shipments.id = tracking_events.shipment_id) AND (shipments.driver_id = auth.uid())))) OR (auth.uid() IN ( SELECT profiles.id
   FROM profiles
  WHERE (profiles.role = 'admin'::user_role))))

policyname: Shipment participants can view tracking events
qual:
(EXISTS ( SELECT 1
   FROM shipments
  WHERE ((shipments.id = tracking_events.shipment_id) AND ((shipments.client_id = auth.uid()) OR (shipments.driver_id = auth.uid())))))

policyname: Drivers can upload their own vehicle photos

   FROM driver_applications
  WHERE ((driver_applications.id = vehicle_photos.driver_application_id) AND (driver_applications.user_id = auth.uid()))))
